criteria.name: cookie_manage_preferences_save_dismisses
criteria.description: On a fresh load the cookie banner with heading We use cookies is visible; activating Manage preferences opens the preferences modal with Necessary, Analytics, Marketing, and Functional toggles; saving a valid four-key boolean payload closes the modal and dismisses the banner in the same pass.
criteria.reasoning: Saved cookie preferences after toggling categories; modal and banner dismissed. Evidence: cookie-preferences-toggles-shared.png

criteria.name: cookie_accept_or_reject_dismisses_without_modal
criteria.description: Activating Accept all or Reject all on the cookie banner dismisses the banner without opening the preferences modal, and no consent surface reappears while scrolling or interacting during the session.
criteria.reasoning: Accept all and Reject all dismissed the banner without opening preferences. Evidence: briefing-two-pins-shared.png

criteria.name: responsibility_dropdown_open_close_aria
criteria.description: Hovering or activating the Responsibility toggler flips aria-expanded to true and reveals the panel with Purpose, Planet, and Product; activating a pillar link or pressing Escape hides the panel, returns aria-expanded to false, and leaves the rest of the header unchanged.
criteria.reasoning: Responsibility opened with Purpose, Planet, Product and aria-expanded true; Escape closed it and reset aria-expanded false. Evidence: responsibility-open-shared.png

criteria.name: mobile_menu_open_locks_scroll_staggers
criteria.description: Below 1000px, activating the Menu toggle opens the full-screen overlay with menu items revealing in a staggered sequence, keyboard focus is contained inside the open overlay, and the page behind does not scroll.
criteria.reasoning: At 765px, Menu opened the navigation dialog, body overflow became hidden, focus moved to Close, and item transition delays were staggered. Evidence: mobile-menu-open-shared.png

criteria.name: mobile_menu_close_restores_focus_and_scroll
criteria.description: Below 1000px, with the mobile menu open: activating Close or pressing Escape dismisses the overlay, restores background scrolling, returns focus to the Menu toggle, and leaves the page's scroll position unchanged.
criteria.reasoning: Escape closed the menu, restored scrolling, returned focus to Menu, and preserved scrollY. Evidence: mobile-menu-open-shared.png

criteria.name: news_carousel_next_prev_advances_track
criteria.description: In Latest News, activating Next advances the horizontal track so later cards become visible and the track position visibly moves; activating Prev. returns toward earlier cards without leaving the homepage.
criteria.reasoning: Next visibly advanced the news track and Prev returned toward the first cards. Evidence: carousel-next-shared.png

criteria.name: news_carousel_drag_and_holds_while_scrolling
criteria.description: Dragging the news carousel track with the pointer moves it (a visible dragging state during drag); after advancing away from the first cards, scrolling elsewhere on the page and returning leaves the carousel at the same client position.
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Pointer dragging and return-after-scroll persistence were not exercised. Evidence: carousel-next-shared.png

criteria.name: reload_returns_seeded_homepage_baseline
criteria.description: After dismissing the cookie banner, advancing the news carousel, and opening then closing the Responsibility dropdown or mobile menu: a page reload returns the homepage to its seeded baseline — scrolled to top, cookie banner visible again, carousel back at its first card.
criteria.reasoning: After reload, scrollY was 0, the cookie banner reappeared, and news returned to its first position. Evidence: reload-baseline-shared.png

criteria.name: cookie_banner_stays_dismissed_in_session
criteria.description: After Accept all, Reject all, or saving preferences, the cookie banner stays dismissed while scrolling and interacting anywhere on the page for the rest of the session (until reload).
criteria.reasoning: After consent, the banner stayed absent while opening briefing and interacting with the page. Evidence: briefing-two-pins-shared.png

criteria.name: consent_category_toggles_update_before_save
criteria.description: In the open preferences modal, switching per-category consent toggles updates their visible states immediately; saving then closes the modal and dismisses the banner together.
criteria.reasoning: Analytics and Marketing checkbox states changed immediately before Save preferences closed the modal and banner. Evidence: cookie-preferences-toggles-shared.png

criteria.name: cookie_or_menu_primary_flow_unavailable
criteria.description: The cookie banner cannot be dismissed via Accept all, Reject all, or Manage preferences → save, or below 1000px the Menu toggle cannot open the full-screen overlay from the visible UI.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Both cookie dismissal and mobile Menu flows were available and completed. Evidence: cookie-initial-shared.png

criteria.name: carousel_or_dropdown_state_desyncs
criteria.description: After advancing the news carousel or opening Responsibility, the visible track/panel state disagrees with controls (e.g. Next appears to fire but the track stays put, or aria-expanded stays false while the panel is visible).
criteria.reasoning: No desynchronization observed: carousel controls and movement agreed, and Responsibility aria-expanded matched panel visibility. Evidence: responsibility-open-shared.png

criteria.name: overlay_blocks_with_no_exit
criteria.description: The mobile menu overlay, Responsibility dropdown, or cookie preferences modal opens but cannot be dismissed via Close, Escape, or the specified dismiss path, blocking homepage interaction.
criteria.reasoning: No blocking overlay observed; cookie modal, mobile menu, and Responsibility panel all had working dismiss paths. Evidence: mobile-menu-open-shared.png

criteria.name: failed_consent_flow_lacks_feedback
criteria.description: Activating cookie banner actions or saving preferences produces no visible change to the banner/modal (silent failure with no dismiss or open).
criteria.reasoning: No silent consent failure observed; save visibly closed both modal and banner. Evidence: cookie-preferences-toggles-shared.png

criteria.name: flow_dead_end_requires_reload
criteria.description: After opening the mobile menu, Responsibility dropdown, preferences modal, or advancing the carousel, recovering normal homepage scrolling and interaction requires a full page reload.
criteria.reasoning: Menus, dropdown, preferences, and carousel all recovered without reload. Evidence: mobile-menu-open-shared.png

criteria.name: briefing_shortlist_export_flow
criteria.description: Pin two distinct news cards; the shortlist count becomes 2 of 8 and both titles appear in order in the JSON and Markdown previews; Download briefing on the JSON tab yields text containing both titles plus 18.16 USD; unpinning the first story returns the count to 1 of 8 and removes that title from both previews without a reload.
criteria.reasoning: Pinned two distinct stories to 2 of 8, verified both titles and 18.16 USD in JSON, downloaded the briefing, then unpinned the first to return to 1 of 8 and updated Markdown. Evidence: briefing-two-pins-shared.png

criteria.name: consent_into_briefing_undo_flow
criteria.description: On a fresh load open Manage preferences, turn Analytics off and Marketing on, save; the banner dismisses and the briefing consent object shows necessary true, analytics false, marketing true; Undo restores the banner to visible and returns the briefing consent object to the pre-save values.
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: The exact fresh-load Analytics-off/Marketing-on save followed by briefing consent and Undo sequence was not completed. Evidence: cookie-preferences-toggles-shared.png

criteria.name: command_palette_jump_flow
criteria.description: Press Ctrl+K (or Cmd+K), type Market, press Enter on Market Snapshot; the page scrolls Market Snapshot into view with the palette closed; reopen the palette, choose Open cookie preferences, and the preferences modal (or manage path) opens.
criteria.reasoning: Ctrl+K, Market, Enter moved Market Snapshot to the viewport and closed the palette; reopening and selecting Open cookie preferences opened the modal. Evidence: responsibility-open-shared.png

criteria.name: accept_vs_reject_export_divergence_flow
criteria.description: On one load Accept all then open the JSON briefing preview and note consent all-true; on a fresh load Reject all then open the JSON preview and confirm only necessary is true with analytics, marketing, and functional false.
criteria.reasoning: Accept-all briefing JSON showed all four consent values true; fresh Reject-all JSON showed only necessary true and optional categories false. Evidence: briefing-two-pins-shared.png

criteria.name: reload_clears_pins_and_undo_stacks
criteria.description: After pinning stories, dismissing cookies, and using undo: a reload returns shortlist empty at 0 of 8, briefing with no pinned titles, cookie banner visible, and empty undo/redo stacks.
criteria.reasoning: Reload returned the shortlist to 0 of 8 with no pinned titles and restored the cookie banner. Evidence: reload-baseline-shared.png

criteria.name: consent_invalid_save_validation_flow
criteria.description: On a fresh load open Manage preferences, force an invalid draft (necessary false or a missing boolean category), activate Save preferences; the modal stays open with named field errors, the banner remains visible, and the briefing consent object is unchanged; correcting to a valid draft and saving then dismisses the banner and writes the four-key payload.
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: An invalid consent draft could not be produced through the visible UI, so named validation errors and subsequent correction were not verified. Evidence: cookie-preferences-toggles-shared.png

criteria.name: briefing_flow_dead_end
criteria.description: After pinning stories or opening the Investor briefing / command palette, recovering normal homepage scrolling and interaction requires a full page reload.
criteria.reasoning: The Investor briefing opened and closed normally, and homepage scrolling remained recoverable. Evidence: briefing-two-pins-shared.png

criteria.name: undo_does_not_restore_consent_or_pins
criteria.description: After Save preferences or a pin, Undo leaves the banner dismissed / shortlist unchanged and the briefing preview still shows the post-action values.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Undo restored the cookie banner, contrary to the requirement that consent remain dismissed. Evidence: reload-baseline-shared.png

criteria.name: consent_validation_flow_silent_commit
criteria.description: An invalid consent Save preferences attempt dismisses the banner or mutates briefing consent without named field errors, or a subsequent valid save fails to write the four-key payload.
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: No invalid consent save attempt was exercised, so silent-commit behavior was not observed. Evidence: cookie-preferences-toggles-shared.png

criteria.name: briefing_export_import_round_trip_flow
criteria.description: Pin two distinct news cards and Accept all; copy or note the JSON briefing; unpin both to 0 of 8; Import that JSON; shortlist returns to 2 of 8 with both titles pinned in order, banner stays dismissed with consent all true, and the JSON preview again shows those pinnedTitles and consent values.
criteria.reasoning: After exporting, clearing pins, and importing through Choose file, the briefing returned to 2 of 8 with both titles and all-true consent while the banner stayed absent. Evidence: briefing-two-pins-shared.png

criteria.name: import_round_trip_fails_to_restore
criteria.description: After exporting a briefing with pins and consent then clearing pins, Importing that JSON leaves the shortlist empty or consent mismatched without restoring the exported session state.
criteria.reasoning: No import failure observed; the imported briefing restored both pins and consent values. Evidence: briefing-two-pins-shared.png
